  OOG_SV_ITENS, TICKET, OOG_SV_LINE, NOT EXISTS (
	SELECT
		oog_sv
	FROM
		OOG_ITENS_WO
	WHERE
		oog_sv_line.oog_sv_lineid = oog_sv_lineid)
	AND (EXISTS (
	SELECT
		ticketid
	FROM
		ticket
	WHERE
		oog_sv_line.oog_sv = ticketid
		AND COALESCE(nullif(:oog_rota, ''), '-1') = CASE
			WHEN COALESCE(nullif(:oog_rota, ''), '-1') = '-1' THEN '-1'
			ELSE COALESCE(oog_rota, '-1')
		END
			AND COALESCE(oog_modalidade, '-1') = CASE
				WHEN COALESCE(nullif(:oog_modalidade, ''), '-1') = '-1' THEN COALESCE(oog_modalidade, '-1')
				ELSE COALESCE(nullif(:oog_modalidade, ''), '-1')
			END
				AND COALESCE(oog_klassmattid, '-1') = CASE
					WHEN oog_modalidade = 'R&R' THEN 'DEFAULT_ITEM'
					ELSE COALESCE(oog_klassmattid, '-1')
				END
					AND status = 'WTD')), -, -, Show all itens of SV, 99778
